content: I'm {{Sohaib Mokhliss}}, a {{Computer & Network Engineering}} student interested in {{development}}, {{DevOps}}, and {{security-first engineering}}.
I like building applications and systems that combine {{clean architecture}}, {{automation}}, and {{strong security principles}}.
I hold a {{Specialized Technician}} diploma in Cybersecurity from ISTA and gained hands-on experience through internships at {{HPS}}, {{CIH}}, and {{ITPay}}.
My path started with {{security assessment}} and {{penetration testing}}, then grew into {{application development}}, {{CI/CD}}, and platform-oriented engineering.
Current focus: {{full-stack development}}, {{backend systems}}, {{CI/CD automation}}, and the day-to-day work required to keep platforms {{reliable}}, {{repeatable}}, and {{secure}}.
I especially enjoy working across {{product development}}, {{Linux environments}}, and container-based infrastructure without losing sight of secure design.
You can connect with me on LinkedIn or review my work on GitHub.
For internships, collaboration, or freelance opportunities, reach me at sohaibmokhliss@gmail.com.
